task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened and read the source SOP file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit or nano) or a terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/RIPA_Lysis_SOP.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new protocol named 'RIPA Lysis Protocol' was created in SciNote.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote web interface showing a protocol with the exact title 'RIPA Lysis Protocol'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the first two steps of the SOP were added as distinct protocol steps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SciNote protocol steps showing 'Wash cells twice with cold PBS.' and 'Add RIPA buffer (1 mL per 10cm dish).' as individual, separate steps.

task_completion.description: Verify that the third and fourth steps of the SOP were added as distinct protocol steps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SciNote protocol steps showing 'Scrape cells and transfer to microcentrifuge tube.' and 'Incubate on ice for 30 min.' as individual, separate steps.

task_completion.description: Verify that the fifth and sixth steps of the SOP were added as distinct protocol steps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SciNote protocol steps showing 'Centrifuge at 14,000xg for 15 min at 4°C.' and 'Transfer supernatant to new tube.' as individual, separate steps.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the SciNote web interface to create the protocol.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and navigating the SciNote application UI, rather than using terminal scripts or API calls to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent created separate steps for each item rather than pasting everything into a single text block.
integrity.visual_evidence: The steps are entered into SciNote's distinct step containers (usually numbered or separated by UI cards), not pasted as a single block of text into the protocol description or a single step.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent accurately transferred the text without hallucinating additional instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the SciNote steps matches the provided privileged information exactly, with no extra steps or modified instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected protocol name is exactly 'RIPA Lysis Protocol'. The expected steps to be digitized, in order, are: 1. Wash cells twice with cold PBS. 2. Add RIPA buffer (1 mL per 10cm dish). 3. Scrape cells and transfer to microcentrifuge tube. 4. Incubate on ice for 30 min. 5. Centrifuge at 14,000xg for 15 min at 4°C. 6. Transfer supernatant to new tube.
